preflight.latestCommit: c952cce docs: lock compliance decision room proof
preflight.dirtyTreePolicy: preserve existing local changes; treat inspected dirty process-gate work as current workspace reality

workItems.goal: Create process-to-screen traceability matrix from audit JSON, P0 process universe, route registry and current components.
acceptance: S032, S037, S039, S056 and S057 have complete traceability rows.
No row claims implementation readiness from screenshot evidence alone.
Matrix parses as JSON.

workItems.goal: Lock process-first UI contract before product UI structure changes.
acceptance: Contract states p0 business process universe is traceability reference only.
Contract maps P0 UI refactors to BP/ACC IDs.
Contract forbids cosmetic copy-only, accordion-only hiding, overlay-only fixes and route creation without record.

workItems.goal: Add typed route/process/acceptance mapping for process-first UI.
acceptance: Every initial P0 risk page has route contract.
Tests fail if P0 long-screen target lacks BP/ACC/gate mapping.
Contract does not authorize new behavior by itself.

workItems.goal: Harden ProcessGateRail with machine-readable business process metadata.
acceptance: Existing call sites continue to work.
Critical call sites pass explicit BP/ACC/gate IDs.
Tests assert metadata for S032, S037, S039, S056 and S057.

workItems.title: Action Board Master-Detail Compression
acceptance: Selected action, missing evidence, owner/due date and next permitted action visible near top.
No copy implies readiness, advisor approval, compliance release, export or client visibility.
S032 capture height below 3400px or documented exception with section nav.

workItems.title: Advisor/Compliance Decision-Room Template Adoption
acceptance: Advisor detail cannot imply release.
Compliance release action appears only with preconditions and blocked reasons.
S039 capture height below 3400px or approved decision-room exception.

workItems.title: Export Stepper and Redaction/Approval Split
acceptance: Redaction cannot approve, generate, download or share.
Approval cannot download/share or create advice release/client acceptance.
S056 and S057 capture heights below 3400px.

workItems.title: Evidence/Document Sufficiency Structure
acceptance: Upload success cannot imply evidence sufficiency, release, export or client visibility.
Evidence detail shows blocker and next permitted action.
S047 capture height below 3000px or approved evidence-detail exception.

workItems.title: Governance/Admin Non-Bypass Structure
acceptance: Admin screens state non-bypass boundaries.
No admin action can imply advice/compliance/evidence/export/client visibility bypass.
S007, S048 and S051 capture heights below 3400px or documented admin audit exception.

workItems.title: Capture Naming Traceability Fix
acceptance: Parameterized route filenames preserve route contract id/tenantId.
Concrete demo substitutions remain in index metadata.
Capture QA naming warnings fall to zero.

fullPlan: pnpm playwright test tests/p0-process-first-ux-burndown.spec.ts tests/ux-page-template-long-page.spec.ts tests/ux-page-template-adoption.spec.ts tests/ux-master-detail-surface.spec.ts --workers=1
pnpm playwright test tests/workflow-gate.spec.ts tests/client-visibility-proof.spec.ts tests/export-safety.spec.ts tests/export-workflow-api.spec.ts --workers=1
captureAcceptance: long-screen risk count lower than current 42
S032, S037, S039, S056 and S057 no longer EXCESSIVE_LENGTH unless signed exception exists
parameterized route naming warnings zero after IMPL-F

decisionGates.question: Approve writing docs/00-current/ALPHAVEST_PROCESS_FIRST_UX_LAYOUT_CONTRACT.md as current repo contract?
Confirm capture naming fix timing.
decisionGates.recommendation: after structural UI slices unless QA noise blocks evidence review

killedBranches.reason: violates process-first requirement and risks hiding structural issues
too much route and safety blast radius; risks True-UX route-evolution violation
useful as support slice but does not solve workflow structure

limitations: This plan does not implement product code.
Screenshot height is a proxy for UX risk, not proof of runtime behavior.
P0 business process spec is current local workspace reality and appears uncommitted at inspection time.
Existing dirty worktree changes must be preserved and understood before implementation.
Route creation or split still requires True-UX route-evolution authorization.
